name: Creating Transactional Email Campaigns
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can create transactional email campaigns to deliver time-sensitive messages, such as order confirmations, password resets, or account notifications, that help maintain customer engagement and trust. These automated communications typically achieve high open rates because recipients expect and rely on them, making them essential for maintaining strong customer relationships and operational efficiency."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Transactional campaigns help optimize your workflow by automating critical customer communications through API or SMTP delivery, ensuring consistent messaging while reducing manual effort in customer service operations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Maropost Marketing Cloud allows you to create and manage "}, {"text": "Transactional Campaigns", "bold": true}, {"text": " within the application's user interface. You can then use Marketing Cloud's REST API or SMTP feature to send these campaigns to your contacts."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can send a transactional email campaign either through API or "}, {"text": "SMTP", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Creating a Transactional Email Campaign"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Perform the following steps to\u00a0create a new transactional campaign:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "In Navigation, go to\u00a0"}, {"text": "CAMPAIGNS", "bold": true}, {"text": ", and then select "}, {"text": "Transactional Campaigns", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "On the Transactional Campaigns page, click NEW CAMPAIGN."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the New Transactional Campaign page, in the Campaign Name text box, enter a name for the campaign."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/NewTransactionalCampaign.05T5g00000e6aoYEAQ.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/NewTransactionalCampaign.05T5g00000e6aoYEAQ.png", "name": "User-added image", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 525, "width": 700}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Subject", "bold": true}, {"text": " text box, enter the text to be shown as the email subject."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Preheader", "bold": true}, {"text": " text box, enter a\u00a0summary text that follows the subject line when the email is viewed from the inbox."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "From Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " text box, enter the name of the sender."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "From Email", "bold": true}, {"text": " text box,\u00a0enter the email address of the sender."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Reply To", "bold": true}, {"text": " text box, enter the email address to\u00a0which you want to receive replies from your contacts."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "From the "}, {"text": "Language", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop-down list, select the language\u00a0to be used for your system-generated links in the campaigns.\u00a0By default, the field is prepopulated with the language previously selected in the COMPANY OVERVIEW tab of the Account & Billing page."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "From the "}, {"text": "Content", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop-down list, select the email content from the\u00a0content list. The content list contains all the content created in your account. To learn about our content builders, see\u00a0"}, {"text": "Content Builders: Overview", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Preview", "bold": true}, {"text": " link to see how your email will look to your contact. Here's what the preview looks like:"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ContentPreview.05T5g00000e6bMzEAI.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ContentPreview.05T5g00000e6bMzEAI.jpg", "name": "User-added image", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 525, "width": 700}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Turn on the "}, {"text": "Show email preview link", "bold": true}, {"text": " toggle button to include a link in the email for previewing the email.\u00a0If the toggle is turned on, the text \"If you are having trouble viewing this email, click here\u201d is automatically inserted at the top of your campaign."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "From the "}, {"text": "Brands", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop-down list, select the Brand\u00a0with which\u00a0you want to associate your campaign."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "From the "}, {"text": "Select Campaign tag", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0drop-down list, select the campaign tags with which you want to associate the campaign. You can select multiple tags."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Address", "bold": true}, {"text": " text box, enter your company address. By default, the field\u00a0is prepopulated with the address previously entered\u00a0in the COMPANY OVERVIEW tab of the Account & Billing page."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "SAVE", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
